_readme: GENERATED by scripts/update-trades.mjs — do not hand-edit. Last SECONDARY SALE (Magic Eden buyNow/acceptBid) per mint; NFTs never sold are absent here and render as 'No trades yet'. 'date' is the sale's on-chain block time (ISO); the front-end derives the '3d ago' relative label from it. 'priceSol' is the sale price in SOL. 'updatedAt' only changes when a sale changes.
